title: The Hawaiian Heist
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to Hawaii to help his friend Hercule protect a jeweled lei necklace, but a disguised spy steals a fake while the real one stays hidden 🌺

q.en: Who is the narrator and editor-in-chief of The Rodent's Gazette?
q.zh: 谁是本书的讲述者，也是《 rodents 公报》的主编？

explain.en: Geronimo introduces himself as the editor in chief of The Rodent's Gazette, the most famous newspaper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: Geronimo 在开头自我介绍为《 rodents 公报》的主编，那是老鼠岛上最有名的报纸。

q.zh: Hercule Poirat 的职业是什么？

explain.en: The book says Hercule is a private detective who runs a well-known detective agency in New Mouse City.
explain.zh: 书中说明 Hercule 是一名私家侦探，在新老鼠城经营一家知名的侦探事务所。

q.en: Why did Hercule need Geronimo's help in Hawaii?
q.zh: Hercule 为什么需要 Geronimo 在夏威夷帮忙？

options.en: A thief had tried to steal Kealoha's necklace three times
options.zh: 有小偷三次试图偷走 Kealoha 的项链

options.en: He wanted Geronimo to be his birthday guest
options.zh: 他想让 Geronimo 当他的生日宾客

options.en: He needed help writing a newspaper
options.zh: 他需要帮忙写一份报纸

options.en: He was lost on the beach

explain.en: Hercule explains a rascally rodent tried to steal Kealoha's necklace three times, so he needed Geronimo's help to keep it safe.
explain.zh: Hercule 解释说有个无赖老鼠曾三次试图偷走 Kealoha 的项链，因此需要 Geronimo 帮忙保护它。

q.en: What is the code to unlock Kealoha's jewelry display case?
q.zh: 打开 Kealoha 珠宝展示柜的密码是什么？

explain.en: Kai accidentally blurts out that the code is 'ALOHA', and Geronimo later types A-L-O-H-A to open the case.
explain.zh: Kai 不小心脱口说出密码是“ALOHA”，后来 Geronimo 输入 A-L-O-H-A 打开了柜子。

q.en: Who designed the special lei necklace for the wedding of Violet Brie and Roderick van Ratten?
q.zh: 谁为 Violet Brie 和 Roderick van Ratten 的婚礼设计了特别的花环项链？

explain.en: Kealoha is the talented jewelry designer who created the lei-inspired necklace for the celebrity couple's wedding.
explain.zh: Kealoha 是才华横溢的珠宝设计师，为这对名人夫妇的婚礼创作了以花环为灵感的项链。

q.en: Where does the 'Super Surfer' race take place?
q.zh: “超级冲浪者”比赛在哪里举行？

options.en: On the Big Island, in Hilo

explain.en: Kai flies them to Oahu for the race, and the starting line is right by Kealoha's store in Honolulu.
explain.zh: Kai 开飞机送他们到瓦胡岛比赛，起点就在 Kealoha 位于檀香山的店铺旁。

q.en: Who was the mouse calling herself 'Grace Cheesington' really?
q.zh: 自称“Grace Cheesington”的老鼠其实是谁？

options.zh: 一位来自老鼠岛的游客

explain.en: Grace pulls off her red wig, contacts, and mask to reveal she is Shadow, a spy Geronimo had met before.
explain.zh: Grace 摘下红假发、隐形眼镜和面具，露出她其实是 Shadow，一个 Geronimo 以前见过的间谍。

q.en: Who is the mega director of EGO (the Enormously Gigantic Organization)?

explain.en: Madame No appears from her leopard-print submarine and is described as the Mega Director of EGO.
explain.zh: Madame No 从她的豹纹潜艇里现身，被描述为 EGO 的总裁。

q.en: What was the necklace in the store display case actually?
q.zh: 店铺展示柜里的项链其实是什么？

explain.en: Kealoha reveals the display necklace was a fake she made to show Roderick; she secretly swapped the real one.
explain.zh: Kealoha 透露展示柜里的项链是她做给 Roderick 看的仿制品，她偷偷把真项链换了。

q.en: How was the real necklace kept safe until the wedding?
q.zh: 真正的项链是如何一直保存到婚礼的？

options.en: Kealoha hid it in a secret drawer at her house
options.zh: Kealoha 把它藏在家中一个秘密抽屉里

options.en: Geronimo wore it on the plane
Madame No locked it in her submarine
options.zh: Madame No 把它锁在潜艇里

options.en: It was mailed to New Mouse City

explain.en: Kealoha pulled the real necklace from a hidden compartment in her dresser drawer at home, then delivered it to the wedding.
explain.zh: Kealoha 从家中梳妆台的一个隐藏隔层里拿出真项链，然后把它送到了婚礼现场。
